# Dasatinib Monohydrate 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Dasatinib Monohydrate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Dasatinib Monohydrate</strong> 目前有 <strong>29 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Dasatinib Monohydrate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Dasatinib Accord Healthcare is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with:  newly diagnosed Philadelphia chromosome positive (Ph+) chronic myelogenous leukaemia (CML) in the chronic phase....</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（99.7%）</li>
<li>liposarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（99.7%）</li>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（99.7%）</li>
<li>ovarian myxoid liposarcoma（99.6%）</li>
<li>ganglioneuroblastoma (disease)（99.6%）</li>
<li>vertebral anomalies and variable endocrine and T-cell dysfunction（99.6%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myopathy with early-onset Paget disease with or without frontotemporal dementia（99.6%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（99.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/dasatinib-monohydrate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
